# hetzner-robot_ip_mac (Resource)

Manages a virtual MAC (vMAC) for an IP address (`PUT` / `DELETE /ip/{ip}/mac`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Generate a virtual MAC (vMAC) for an IP address.
resource "hetzner-robot_ip_mac" "node" {
  ip = "1.2.3.4"
}
```

Import an existing vMAC by IP:

```shell
terraform import hetzner-robot_ip_mac.node 1.2.3.4
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `mac` (String) The generated virtual MAC
